summary: Tested Wishlist & Notifications system for Hispaloshop. All backend APIs working (11/11 passed). Frontend code verified - wishlist button on product detail, wishlist page in customer dashboard, and notification icons for new types all correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: WISHLIST CRUD VERIFIED: POST /api/wishlist/{product_id} returns in_wishlist=True
WISHLIST CRUD VERIFIED: GET /api/wishlist returns list with product details (product_id, name, price, image, added_at)
WISHLIST CRUD VERIFIED: DELETE /api/wishlist/{product_id} returns in_wishlist=False
WISHLIST CRUD VERIFIED: GET /api/wishlist/check/{product_id} returns correct status
WISHLIST BUTTON VERIFIED (code): ProductDetailPage.js line 800 has data-testid='wishlist-button' with Heart icon
WISHLIST TOGGLE VERIFIED (code): Button shows 'En tu lista de deseos' when in wishlist, red fill on heart
DASHBOARD WISHLIST LINK VERIFIED (code): CustomerLayoutResponsive.js line 42 has /dashboard/wishlist route with Bookmark icon
WISHLIST PAGE VERIFIED (code): WishlistPage.js has data-testid='wishlist-page' and 'wishlist-empty' states
NOTIFICATION ICONS VERIFIED (code): Header.js iconMap has product_approved (CheckCircle green), product_rejected (XCircle red), price_drop (TrendingDown emerald)
PRICE DROP NOTIFICATION VERIFIED: PUT /api/admin/products/{id}/price triggers create_notification for wishlist users
PRODUCT APPROVAL NOTIFICATION VERIFIED: admin_dashboard.py line 107 creates product_approved notification for producer
PRODUCT REJECTION NOTIFICATION VERIFIED: admin_dashboard.py line 123 creates product_rejected notification for producer
PRODUCER PRICE UPDATE VERIFIED: products.py line 474-486 also triggers price_drop notification when producer updates price
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wishlist & Notifications system fully tested. Backend: All CRUD operations work. Admin price drop triggers notification. Frontend: Wishlist button on product page with data-testid='wishlist-button', Dashboard sidebar has wishlist link at /dashboard/wishlist, NotificationsBell has iconMap for product_approved (CheckCircle), product_rejected (XCircle), price_drop (TrendingDown).

features_verified.POST /api/wishlist/{product_id}: PASS - Returns in_wishlist=True, idempotent for duplicates
features_verified.GET /api/wishlist: PASS - Returns list with product_id, name, price, image, added_at
features_verified.wishlist_button_product_page: PASS (code) - data-testid='wishlist-button' with Heart icon in ProductDetailPage.js
features_verified.wishlist_toggle_state: PASS (code) - Button text changes, heart fills red when in wishlist
features_verified.dashboard_wishlist_link: PASS (code) - /dashboard/wishlist in CustomerLayoutResponsive.js with Bookmark icon
features_verified.notification_icons: PASS (code) - iconMap in Header.js has all 3 new types
features_verified.product_approval_notification: PASS (code) - admin_dashboard.py creates notification on approval
features_verified.product_rejection_notification: PASS (code) - admin_dashboard.py creates notification on rejection
